creator: daniel@morante.net
text:
Created attachment 205907
Unified diff to restore the port

databases/pecl-memcache was removed due to PHP 5.6 being EOL.  There is an unofficial fork maintaining a version that works with PHP 7.x.  Until they can publish to PECL (https://news-web.php.net/php.pecl.dev/15838), I've changed the port to download the sources from the Github repository hosting the forked version.

SVN Commands used:

svnlite copy https://svn.FreeBSD.org/ports/head/databases/pecl-memcache@488893 databases/pecl-memcache
